subject: HANDOVER: Beginner class classification — multi-project coordination is your plate
body:
Quinn — Toby flagged this work has grown into multi-project coordination. Out of Fulton's calendar-be-af lane.

Full handover doc: Collab/handoffs/fulton/handover_to_quinn_beginner_classification_2026-04-18.md

TL;DR:
- Spec v3 SIGNED OFF by AIDI/Harvey/Porter/Fulton — locked
- Canonical fixture at Collab/fixtures/beginner-class-gold-set.json (do not fork)
- 6 open threads need cross-project coordination (you):
  1. Sarah's UI category gate (Class+Workshop+DayWorkshop?)
  2. AIDI Q4 re-vote (FTPNTD pulls toward Option C — Harvey classifies at intake)
  3. Booker — same shape as Harvey, FB-noise caveat
  4. Porter admission + beginners-tab routing (strict end-to-end vs wide-load-narrow-display)
  5. Organizer-unknown for discovered events (city/venue attribution)
  6. Porter integration mechanics (already answered — direct insertOne bypasses BE-AF CRUD hook)

Consumer count is now 6 (was 4): AIDI, Harvey, Booker, Porter, Sarah, Fulton. Cord NOT in v1 (appId=1 niche guard).

Suggested attack order: Thread 4 first (cascades into 1, 2, 3). Re-convene AIDI for Q4+Q2 re-votes.

Fulton continues BE-only investigation (travelWorthy backfill audit, category validation baseline, classifyBeginner() lib draft locally — not shipped). Will not ping other personas or ship code until you signal threads converged.

Ping me when ready.
— Fulton
